hero.title: Services
hero.intro: We offer a small set of practical services for bands that need help getting a tour together, producing merch, or figuring out a vinyl run. We do these things for our own bands, we know how difficult it can be to arrange all this.

items.title: Tour Booking
items.image_alt: Band members rehearsing together in a studio
items.summary: We are here to help you tour and make the necessary arrangements so you can get your music to Europe and Balkan grounds.
bullets: Routing support for short and multi-date runs
Schedule coordination and practical planning (Van rentals, costs, etc.)
items.contact_note: If you have already started planning and you need an extra pair of hands for this, mention the route, timing, and what stage you are at.

items.title: Merch Printing
items.image_alt: Workshop scene with a person preparing a t-shirt with a heat press
items.summary: Merch production support for bands that need solid runs handled cleanly, without turning the whole thing into a generic catalog exercise.
bullets: Small-format print collateral and supporting items
Run planning and practical production coordination
items.contact_note: If merch is what you need, tell us the formats, rough quantities, and timing.

items.image_alt: Vinyl record being pressed in a production machine
items.summary: Vinyl production guidance for artists, workable route through pressing options, planning, and coordination.
items.contact_note: If vinyl is in the plan, mention the format, timeline, and any practical constraints.
bullets: Partner communication through the production process
items.title: Vinyl Printing

sections.title: How We Work
sections.intro: We keep the process direct. If something makes sense, we scope it clearly and move. If it does not, we would rather say so early.

steps.title: Start with context
steps.body: Tell us what you need, where things stand, and what timeline you are actually working with.

steps.title: Planning along with the band
steps.body: We'll sit down and discuss with you what's best for you based on the things you need. We keep the DIY ethics real so we'll work on this together and agree on next steps.

steps.title: Get things done
steps.body: Once we agree on what the band needs, we move forward with the next steps, always keeping the band in the loop of progress.

sections.title: Start an Inquiry
sections.intro: Send one inquiry and we'll get back to you ASAP.
